args.body: Exception request: Ravi Chen (bakery) asks to jump onboarding call queue ahead of 7 accounts due to weekend market deadline. Root cause of delay was our bounced welcome packet (carrier-side fault), which is a legitimate exception factor. Counter-factor: fairness to 7 queued accounts. Routing to same-day review rather than direct close or direct grant.

args.summary: T-308 / Ravi Chen: Same-day review requested. Our welcome packet bounced, causing launch slip; customer requests queue jump ahead of 7 accounts before weekend market. Need decision on exception (expedite vs. honor queue / offer alternative such as async onboarding or off-hours slot).

args.body: Hi Ravi — thanks for flagging this, and apologies that our welcome packet bounced and pushed your launch. Because the delay started on our side, I've routed your request for an expedited onboarding slot to same-day review with our onboarding lead. You'll hear back today with either an expedited slot or the closest workable alternative ahead of your weekend market. — Support

args.summary: T-308 placed on same-day review rather than direct close. Filed memo capturing exception factors (our bounced packet vs. fairness to 7 queued accounts), escalated to Onboarding Lead for same-day decision, updated ticket status, and acknowledged Ravi with a same-day response commitment.
